content:
Perfect! The task has been completed successfully.

```json
{
  "analysis": "The output file has been verified and is complete. The file /root/output/flood_results.csv contains 14 lines (1 header line + 13 data lines for the 13 stations with flooding). The file size is 179 bytes, which is appropriate for the data. The CSV has the correct format with two columns: station_id and flood_days. All 13 stations listed experienced at least one flood day during April 1-7, 2025, meeting the requirement to only include stations with at least one flood day.",
  "plan": "The task is complete. The script successfully: 1) Read 79 Michigan USGS station IDs from /root/data/michigan_stations.txt, 2) Downloaded NWS flood stage thresholds for all stations, 3) Downloaded USGS instantaneous water level data (gage height) for April 1-7, 2025, 4) Aggregated to daily maximum values, 5) Detected flood events by comparing to thresholds, and 6) Output results to /root/output/flood_results.csv with only the 13 stations that had flooding.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
```
